title: Gooey Spanish Vanilla Crumble
description: A tangy and gooey comfort dish featuring a low-calorie-friendly version of the classic Spanish crumble with an added touch of vanilla pod for sweetness and warmth.

ingredients.name: milk or milk substitute
ingredients.amount: 6-8 ounces (optional, for binding and moistening the crumble coat)

instructions: Grate the vanilla pods and set aside any seeds for garnish.
In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour, oat flour, unsweetened coconut flakes, softened butter, sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix until crumbly texture is achieved.
If using milk or substitute, slowly add it to the crumble mixture, stirring continuously to prevent clumping and ensure even distribution of liquid.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a dish with butter or non-stick spray.
Transfer the crumble mixture evenly onto prepared baking dish. Smooth out any remaining bits on top for an attractive, decorative layer.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy to touch.
While the crumble is cooling down, scoop vanilla ice cream into a bowl and serve with warm crumble coating.
